column1: Nutanix Confidential Information. For reference only, please reach out to Nutanix support for any questions.

column6: The End of Maintenance (EOM) and the End of Support Life (EOSL) dates for AOS 6.10.Z are an exception as it is the last release to follow the legacy LTS/STS EOSL policy.

The End of Life dates are based on the Release Date of AOS 6.8 eSTS. Nutanix has extended the End of Maintenance date for AOS 6.5.Z by 2 months and the End of Support Life date by 1 month. The dates currently posted are inclusive of the extension.
Nutanix extended the End of Support Life date for AOS 5.10.Z by 1 month.
Nutanix extended the End of Maintenance date for AOS 5.5.Z by 8 months and the End of Support Life date by 5 months.
